## Checklist

- [ ] The change is linked to an Issue with observable acceptance criteria.
- [ ] Systems, models, datasets, configs and evaluators are pinned where relevant.
- [ ] No credentials, private source data or unapproved raw traces are committed.
- [ ] New or changed metrics include denominator and failure-handling rules.
- [ ] `docs/status.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, ADR or progress log is updated when the project state changed.
- [ ] Reported numbers trace back to immutable run records.
